title: Figure 2 in Embryo retention, character optimization, and the origin of the extra-embryonic membranes of the amniotic egg
author: Laurin, Michel
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 2. Distribution of random trees (out of 10,000) versus number of steps required by the distribution of developmental characters. (a) Character 1 (presence or absence of extended embryo retention). The reference tree requires three steps (*) for this character. (b) Character 2 (developmental stage at oviposition, with ordered states). The reference tree requires nine steps (*) for this character. Note that for both characters, many random trees require no more steps than the reference tree, thus implying that there is no phylogenetic signal in these characters.
